dimensions.description: Checks whether historical financial data is present, internally consistent, sourced or traceable, and aligned with the narrative.
Checks whether the report includes explicit three-year assumptions for growth, margins, cash flow drivers, and scenario logic.
Checks whether WACC, terminal growth, free cash flow logic, fair value, and sensitivity analysis are explicit and numerically plausible.
Checks whether peer companies are industry-relevant and comparison metrics are normalized and interpreted correctly.
Checks breadth and specificity of business, financial, valuation, regulatory, macro, and data-quality risks.
Checks whether the recommendation follows from financial evidence, valuation, peer comparison, risks, and catalysts.
Checks structure, section completeness, traceability, graceful failure handling, and cross-section consistency.
